pi_items.source: examples/sumo_env/scripts/setup_sumo.sh explicitly creates and populates this directory with real-world Bologna data
task.json instructions specify this exact path; export_result.sh and verifier.py check it for the generated trips
task.json instructions specify this exact path; export_result.sh and verifier.py check it for the generated routes
task.json instructions ask to generate exactly 200 trips; verifier.py explicitly scores based on expected_trips = 200 (expected_trips * 0.9 <= count <= expected_trips * 1.1)
task.json instructions specify a 3600-second period; verifier.py enforces a significant time span by checking maximum departure time > 1800

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world Bologna Acosta network located at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta. The agent must successfully generate approximately 200 trips spanning a 3600-second period, saving the trips file to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/random_trips.trips.xml and the corresponding routes file to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/random_trips.rou.xml. Verification confirms the presence of valid XML at these exact paths, correctly counting the trip size, temporal distribution (maximum departure time > 1800s), and checking that route edges are structurally valid within the network.
